name: Mini || ~lil' size queen~
description:
She may be small, but she has BIG plans... Or rather, she hopes that you do. A nice, long... 'plan'... for her.

(basically this image, lol)

She likes you but is also a raid boss 'size queen.' So she's trying to find out if you got enough meat to be worth the trouble... But will you have what she's been looking for? Will you play her game or try to keep the truth from her? Or will you just whip it out?

.

.

.

Some yap

There are other bots for Mini, so I wanted to make one leaning more into the whole 'size queen' thing for a silly scenario... It should be neat to experiment with personas to see how she may react. Have fun!

Oh, also... This is my first time making a bot. Like, ever. So I hope it's passable. I know it likes to fuck up the asterisks around 'thoughts' text blocks, especially early on. I tried to remedy that, but the AI no likey... It's easy to manually fix if you need to however, so... Enjoy that, haha. <3

Art credit: puppy in space - kloe mone
creator: Voidium_
